items.title: Experienced Real Estate Investment Professionals (Nationwide)
items.content_html:
Experienced Real Estate Investment Professionals (Nationwide)

Acquisitions Managers • Lead Managers • Operations Managers • Dispositions Managers• Transaction Coordinators • Project Managers • Executive Assistants • Property Management

Looking for your next opportunity?

At CARR Talent, we specialize exclusively in placing experienced professionals for the best real estate investment companies across the United States. We are the recruiters for the country’s biggest real estate masterminds and many other business communities.

Whether you're actively looking or simply open to hearing about exceptional opportunities, we'd love to get to know you.

We are continually recruiting top performers for positions including:

  • Acquisitions Managers / Home Buying Specialists

  • Lead Managers

  • Operations Managers

  • Dispositions Managers

  • Transaction Coordinators

  • Project Managers

  • Executive Assistants

  • Property Management roles

  • Other experienced real estate investment professionals

Opportunities Include

  • Remote positions

  • On-site positons

  • Relocation opportunities

  • Hybrid roles

  • Small entrepreneurial companies

  • Large established investment firms

  • Competitive salaries, commissions, and bonuses

  • Strong cultures and growth opportunities

We're Looking For

Professionals who have experience working for a real estate investment company and have demonstrated success in their role.

Ideal candidates are:

  • Proven performers with measurable results

  • Excellent communicators

  • Highly organized

  • Coachable

  • Team players

  • Strong with CRMs and follow-up

  • Looking for long-term career growth

Why Connect With CARR Talent?

Unlike applying to a single company, joining our talent network gives you access to opportunities across the country.

Our clients include many of the most respected real estate investment companies in the industry, and we're constantly matching exceptional talent with businesses that fit their goals, compensation expectations, and culture.

Even if we don't have the perfect opportunity today, we'll keep you in mind as new positions become available.

If you're experienced and open to...

  • Better compensation

  • Better leadership

  • Better culture

  • Better growth opportunities

  • Remote work

  • Relocation

...we'd love to hear from you.

Apply today and become part of our nationwide network of proven real estate investment professionals.

items.title: Home Buying Specialist
items.content_html:
ABOUT US

Our client is one of the fastest growing real estate investment companies in the country, located in Miami, with over 9 years in business throughout the state of Florida and 1,000+ successful transactions under their belt. With a very experienced leadership team and a robust training program they buy and sell real estate investments using the latest technology, AI, and proven systems to dominate the real estate investment space. The client emphasizes experience handling complex or time-sensitive situations such as foreclosure, inherited homes, or financial distress, positioning itself as a reliable solution for motivated sellers.

If you're driven, coachable, and hungry for success—this is the place to be.

JOB SUMMARY

Our client is seeking an ambitious, results-driven Home-Buying Specialist to join their growing team.

This role is focused on helping property owners solve problems while negotiating and securing off-market real estate opportunities. They are looking for someone who can build trust quickly, ask the right questions, uncover motivation, and confidently guide sellers toward a decision.

This is a professional sales role within a fast-growing real estate investment company. The ideal candidate is highly competitive, disciplined, coachable, and motivated by performance-based compensation.

WHAT WE OFFER

Compensation & Earnings Transparency

  • Uncapped Commission Structure: Earn commissions based on total deal revenue from contracts you source and close

  • 12% commission on monthly revenue

  • Opportunity to jump to 15% after hitting revenue targets

  • On-Target Earnings: $120K-300K annually with no cap on earnings (ability to negotiate base-salary/draw for first 3 months of employment)

Leads, Tools & Support

  • Warm, pre-qualified inbound seller leads (no cold prospecting)

  • CRM and proven sales process

  • Daily support and coaching

  • Market-generated opportunities

  • Fast-moving, high-performance environment

  • Cutting-edge AI systems designed to minimize non-sales activities

  • Opportunities to invest in properties for a discounted price in order to grow personal portfolios

  • Flexibility for hybrid work, if necessary

ESSENTIAL DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES

  • Close a consistent pipeline of ready-to-sell seller and wholesaler leads generated by internal marketing and follow-up teams

  • Conduct high-volume inbound and outbound phone calls to qualify seller motivation, timelines, and pricing

  • Lead discovery conversations, overcome objections, and move prospects toward signed contracts

  • Analyze deals by evaluating ARV, repair estimates, and seller circumstances using underwriting tools

  • Accurately input, manage, and track deals within CRM and internal systems

  • Build trust-based relationships with homeowners, agents, and wholesalers throughout the transaction lifecycle

  • Schedule and conduct virtual or in-person appointments as needed to advance deals

  • Collaborate daily with acquisitions, underwriting, and dispositions teams to keep deals moving forward

  • Meet or exceed monthly contract volume and revenue targets tied directly to commission earnings

  • Travel to properties to close deals with sellers (driving radius of roughly 30 minutes, if local to the Miami-Dade area)

  • Maintain accurate forecasting and pipeline reporting to support business planning

QUALIFICATIONS

  • 2+ years in acquisitions, wholesaling, real estate sales, or high-ticket sales

  • Excellent communication skills with a consultative, relationship-driven sales approach

  • Demonstrated follow-through and commitment to delivering results

  • Coachable mindset with willingness to learn scripts, systems, and underwriting fundamentals

  • Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, metrics-driven sales environment

  • Strong phone and organizational skills with attention to detail in deal documentation and follow-up

  • Team-oriented attitude with a collaborative approach to shared goals

  • Comfortable discussing creative finance and cash offers

  • CRM disciplined

  • Competitive and self-motivated

  • Ability to work with cutting-edge technology with proper training
